raw_input:
[5.0/5] Recommend. Plan to continue to purchase Have ordered this kit twice recently as well as other face products from this line. Seems to work great. Have sensitive facial skin and doesn't cause irritation. [5.0/5] This is a great product. It leaves my dry delicate skin feeling ... This is a great product. It leaves my dry delicate skin feeling a little dry but does not irritate. It does a great job of tightening and exfoliating. I highly recommend this product. [2.0/5] Nothing I noticed no difference in my skin after using for 3 days. I will not be purchasing this product again. [5.0/5] Great product! Detailed review and pics. This product basically asks you to take a three-day vacation from your normal skin-care routine and only use the contents of a total of nine pretty small (0.05 ounce each) foil packets. You follow the three step process each night for three nights then only use a wet cloth to "wash" your face in the morning.

Because this product makes great promises in a VERY short period of time, (and for $20 for a small amount of product, let's be honest!) and because I read reviews before I make purchases, and because I was able to purchase this product at a discount in exchange for evaluation and my HONEST review, I have swallowed my pride (uhm, ego??!!??) and am not only going to share the process for this product but also, several of my "naked face" photos - before, during and after. This way you, my fellow Amazon buyer, may not only read my opinion BUT also decide for yourself how much difference this product made in at least this instance for me.

BASICS- I am a woman, former Marine and (ugh!) a smoker. I will be turning 50 in June 2016 and although I have (so far) not found any actual wrinkles, other than a couple of minor horizontal lines on my forehead (thanks Dad & grandma for the genetics!), I DID have fairly prominent acne from about 13 until after 30 (& even a couple now!) leaving scars mostly on my cheeks and chin. I also was a serious sun worshipper, getting as brown as I possibly could, including tanning beds, outdoor activities, the Marine Corps and beach/pool lounging (anyone my age group remember baby oil and iodine? The worst thing you can do for your skin?? Yep! That was me!). It honestly is a miracle I don't look like a raisin. I do have discoloration & brown patches all over my face. I stopped actively tanning just after my 40th birthday and now always wear sunscreen at least in my facial moisturizer. I do have a pretty good routine now because I want to try to preserve what I have and fight Mother Nature and gravity as much as possible, but my face needs some work.
ALL PHOTOS WERE TAKEN AT APPROX THE SAME TIME, IN THE SAME PLACE WITH CAMERA AT APPROX THE SAME DISTANCE FROM MY FACE (too close!!) AND IN THE SAME LIGHTING. NO FILTERS OR PHOTOSHOP USED.
BEFORE PICTURE- The "before" photo,
(hopefully these will show up in the proper order but in it I am wearing a grey t-shirt with black "squares" and a pony tail) shows the brown spots, scarring and general lack of "glow". This was the night I began the process.

THE PROCESS- Three steps/Three days
STEP ONE "Gentle Prep Cleanser"- The cleanser is a pearly white color (see photograph) The directions say it removes makeup, but as you can tell from my "before" pic, I did remove my makeup with a makeup remover cloth. I did this for two reason: 1- Because I didn't trust that the small amount of cleanser would actually remove makeup and clean enough and 2- Because I wanted naked skin to evaluate the cleanser itself. I need not have worried. The cleanser cleans the skin and prepares it for the "peel" product at step two. The cleanser was very pleasant "clean" smelling and although it foamed very little (see photo of this step) it amazingly did a great job of further cleansing the skin and removing every trace of makeup (I know this because I used a white wash cloth to rinse my face - no I didn't photograph the dirty cloth!). My skin felt quite clean, but not "squeaky/stripped", which is good, IMO.
STEP TWO- "Non-Irritating Pro Peel". This is a clear gel (see pic) which had a slight astringent smell to it. This is applied to the now clean and towel dries skin using fingertips. The directions say to keep it on for 5 minutes, or 2-3 for sensitive skin rinse them pat dry. I felt no tingling or burning at all, just the alcohol smell which is no big deal. This product does not dry like a mask and it doesn't turn white like some chemical peels are supposed to do. In fact, on the second night, I got distracted and left this on for over 10 minutes and still had no discomfort at all. When rinsing, be careful to avoid the eyes. After this step, my skin did feel kind of tight but not in an uncomfortable way at all!
STEP THREE- "Radiance Renewing Deep Moisturizer"- OH MY GOODNESS!!! I absolutely LOVE LOVE LOVE this moisturizer!!! I am going to try finding this alone for use as a night cream. As you can see from the photos of the "dots" of moisturizer on my face, there was not a lot of the cream in the packet & I thought it would not be enough (I ALWAYS treat my neck all around and my chest area with the same process as my face!) but - again - I was wrong to be worried. This moisturizer feels so very good! I honestly wanted to use it all over. When I find the moisturizer alone, I will edit this review and add the name of the product! This cream was the perfect way to end the process.

All three steps took less than 15 minutes per night.

The "after" photo was taken this morning because I wanted to allow the third night's process to fully work, so the lighting is a bit different. If anything, the daylight is harsher than the night photos and I took this picture even closer so I could really see.

RESULTS- It is usually difficult to be objective about your own appearance. At least it is for me. I look at this face each day and see all my faults. However, I honestly can say that I have noticed smaller pore appearance and brighter, smoother skin. Putting on my makeup this morning was so much easier and to my great surprise, the makeup actually lasted well the entire day without the blotchy, tired appearance I usually find by the end of the day (the photo of me with makeup shows that my hair has definitely fallen and my eyes look tired but the foundation held up pretty well!). I did do an informal survey of a few friends, texting only the before and after photos for their candid opinions. The feedback was quite good! I am an "average looking" woman, and this product did not make me suddenly a Cover Girl, but in my honest opinion, this product is a clear winner! At the $19.99 price point, I am definitely going to be repeating this "Three-Day Vacation" again... Perhaps up to four times a year!

I do enjoy testing products and sharing my experience, and hope the information I share helps other Amazon customers decide if a product is right for them, so if you find my review at all helpful (either good or bad for the product) please let me know by selecting "yes" in response to the question "was this review helpful?" At the bottom of this review. Also, please feel free to ask me any additional questions you may have. I am happy to help as much as I can! [5.0/5] Great addition to any skincare routine! As someone who fully understands the complexity of an individual's skin, I am a fan of introducing my clients and students to a variety of skincare brands in order to diversify the skincare routine. However, our skin is prone to "acting out" or reacting to internal changes (stress, diet, hormones) as well as the external environment (pollution, weather). Thus, I have been keen to find to a product that can get the skin back in order, can calm down redness and irritation, and will provide actual long term change. I tried this product out for 3 days, and have since recommended it to dozens of clients and students, as well as make up artists. I found that each pack of 3 steps lasted me more than a day, and so this is a very good value because you can make this last a while. Immediately before and after using these 3 steps for 3 days, I used a gentle skincare routine that focused on oils and gentle exfoliation. Try to abstain from retinols and other heavy duty chemicals for several days before and after using this, and always wear SPF. After 3 day my skin lost a lot of the dryness and gray-ness that it has been carrying for a while. I noticed no change in acne, and my skin looked supple and healthy, especially around the mouth. There was also a loss of unwanted texture, and a slight reduction in redness and post acne scarring. I highly recommend this treatment as a once-a-month type procedure if you are serious about taking care of your skin. I received this product at a discounted rate in exchange for an honest review and will continue to recommend it during my seminars and will purchase more. [5.0/5] So soft & smooth after one use! After using it the first night I could feel the difference in how smooth my skin felt. And it has remained smooth days after I finished the three-day pack. Would certainly purchase other MD Complete products based on this result. [4.0/5] and loved the results the first day I just bought the cleanser, wrinkle reducer, moisturizer and 3 day Booster Pack. I started with the 3 Day Pack...and loved the results the first day...so much I couldn't wait to do it again the next night. The second morning I noticed a dryness around my mouth that as the day went on developed into a very chapped, red and cracked skin fold ( it caused some swelling which was not attractive). That evening I did the peel but avoided the corners of my mouth (which I should have avoided in the first place) and was very happy with the final outcome...although the corners of my mouth are still chapped so I will be avoiding that area when I begin the Retinol cream tonight. I am very hopeful that the rest of the regime will be what my skin needs. I am 58 and a full time student in a Nursing School Program...so I feel and look exhausted..I am hoping to recapture some healthy glow...I will review the rest of the regime after I give it 30 days. [5.0/5] I love this product I love this product. It is a 3 step face peel product. The first time I used it- my tface burned a little but after that it was ok. I like that it really deep cleans my pores. I left it on for about 10 mins. Of course it's not like getting a deep peel at the Dr.s but it will keep your face very smooth and clean. I think that they are discounting this product though. [4.0/5] Good little kit Nice booster kit [5.0/5] My skin is so soft and it definitely helps make fine lines disappear I have been using this product for over a year. My skin is so soft and it definitely helps make fine lines disappear. [5.0/5] Tighten and smooth I like this booster pack. its like the vitamin c serum and wrinkle remedy in concentration. My results were my skin felt firmer and pores smaller. [5.0/5] Love this product Love this product. Easy to use. Skin really looks brighter after use. I usually get complements after the first or second day. [5.0/5] A great skin product line from a Doctor I personally trust! Excellent product. Made my skin so much smoother and fresh. Gentle yet very effective, will buy again. [5.0/5] Outstanding product! Absolutely met all my expectations and more using MD Complete Booster Pack Anti-Aging by Dr. Zelickson. Many of my friends often compliment me on how my face looks.....making me look younger than I am. I have been using this product for several years and plan on doing so for along long time! [5.0/5] Tamara Crane 03/07/2016 Ok, this is a great simple peel, but very light (at least for my skin). It does exactly as it states and your skin is definitely replenished, with a wonderful glow. Just remember, this is just a booster.....so now that I've used it, it will definitely work a lot better for a boost in-between my more intense peels. Like I mentioned though it's a very subtle peeling agent, so don't expect dramatic effects after the 3days, expect a glow of replenishment. The instructions are easy to follow, and as for a tingling sensation, it will vary for everyone. I felt a slight tingling the 1st night, but the 2nd and 3rd, I honestly forgot it was on my face. I received this product at a discounted price for my honest review and opinion of the product. I hope this helps for some who have a higher tolerance, like me.
Thank you for letting me test your product. [4.0/5] I would have loved to get more for a little less. Okay, yes I really liked this product. The first day's treatment made my face glow. The second and third day I guess I was getting used to looking great so my enthusiasm waned a bit. Actually, I think I saw such a difference the first time I used this that the other two days just couldn't compare. So, my idea would be to offer the product as a one time use for a special occasion or weekly application. But it would need to have a little more product of each of the three components. I did not think the packets contained enough product to justify the expense or make it feel luxurious. The 3 day booster at $19.97 is expensive for such a small amount of product I think. Therefore I graded 4 stars rather than 5 as I would have otherwise.
I was supplied a discounted product to try in exchange for an honest review. I depend on the reviews and ratings of others to help me make purchasing decisions [1.0/5] It wasted my money to try this product No such thing as described. It wasted my money to try this product.

response:
Most reviewers love product. Skin feel soft, smooth, bright after 3-day kit. Kit have three steps: cleanser, peel, moisturizer. Use three nights in row. Take 15 minutes each night.

Many say pores look smaller, fine lines less visible, skin look younger, more glow. One woman use product for years, friends say face look younger. Skin expert recommend to clients and students. Say good value for price around $20.

Some warnings from reviewers: peel tingle or burn little bit - normal. One person get dry cracked skin near mouth from peel - say avoid that area. One person say packets maybe too small for price. One person say no difference after 3 days.

Most say buy again. Several reviewers get product at discount for honest review.
